title: May 28, 2026AnnouncementsAnthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation
summary: Announcements Anthropic raises $65B in Series H funding at $965B post-money valuation May 28, 2026 Anthropic has raised $65 billion in Series H funding led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, Greenoaks, and Sequoia Capital, valuing the company at $965 billion post-money. Global enterprises across industries are deploying Claude in their core operations, and a growing number of people around the world use it for their everyday work. Since our Series G in February, adoption has continued to grow across global enterprise customers, and our run-rate revenue crossed $47 billion earlier this month. This latest funding is expected to advance our safety and interpretability research, expand compute to meet growing demand for Claude, and scale the products and partnerships our customers rely on. “Claude is increasingly indispensable to our growing global community of customers, and we work tirelessly to make tools like Claude Code and Cowork more helpful, more powerful, and more adaptable to their needs,” said Krishna Rao, Chief Financial Officer of Anthropic. “This funding will help us serve the historic demand we are experiencing, stay at the research frontier, and bring Claude to more of the places where work happens.” The round was co-led by Capital Group, Coatue, D1 Capital Partners, GIC, ICONIQ, and XN. Significant investors in this round include AMP PBC, Baillie Gifford, Blackstone, Brookfield, D.E. Shaw Ventures, DST Global, Fidelity Management & Research Company, General Catalyst, Insight Partners, Jane Street, Lightspeed Venture Partners, MGX, NTTVC, NX1 Capital, Situational Awareness LP, T. Rowe Price Associates, Inc., T. Rowe Price Investment Management, Inc., and Temasek. It also includes $15 billion of previously committed investments from hyperscalers, including $5 billion from Amazon . Joining them are strategic infrastructure partners — Micron, Samsung, and SK hynix — whose technologies play a critical role in the world's supply of memory, storage, and logic ch
title_es: Anthropic recauda $65B en ronda Series H a valuación de $965B
bajada: Anthropic logró una recaudación histórica de $65 mil millones liderada por Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer y Sequoia Capital, valuando la empresa en $965 mil millones. Con ingresos en run-rate de $47 mil millones mensuales, estos fondos financiarán investigación en seguridad e interpretabilidad, además de expandir capacidad de cómputo.
bajada_en: Anthropic achieved a historic $65 billion Series H raise led by Altimeter Capital, Dragoneer, and Sequoia Capital, valuing the company at $965 billion. With $47 billion in monthly run-rate revenue, these funds will support safety research and compute expansion.

title: Introducing Claude Opus 4.8ProductMay 28, 2026An upgrade to our Opus class of models, with stronger performance across coding, agentic tasks, and professional work, and the consistency to handle long-running work.
summary: Product Announcements Introducing Claude Opus 4.8 May 28, 2026 We’re upgrading Claude Opus to a new version: Claude Opus 4.8. It builds on Opus 4.7 with improvements across benchmarks, and is a more effective collaborator. It’s available today for the same price. Opus 4.8 launches alongside several new features. Users on claude.ai now have control over the amount of effort Claude puts into a task. Claude Code has a new “dynamic workflows” feature that allows it to tackle very large-scale problems. And fast mode for Opus 4.8—where the model can work at 2.5× the speed—is now three times cheaper than it was for previous models. Opus 4.8’s capabilities The table below shows how Opus 4.8 compares to its predecessor and to other models on tests of coding, agentic skills, reasoning, and practical knowledge work tasks. More details and a much wider range of capability evaluations are provided in the Claude Opus 4.8 System Card . Collaborating with Opus 4.8 Early testers have found Claude Opus 4.8 to be more reliable and sharper in its judgement when it’s performing agentic tasks. Below are quotes from many of these testers about their experience collaborating with Opus 4.8: Claude Opus 4.8 has noticeably better judgment. In Claude Code, it asks the right questions, catches its own mistakes, pushes back when a plan isn’t sound, and builds up confidence around complex, multi-service explorations before making big changes. It’s a great model to build with. On our Super-Agent benchmark, Claude Opus 4.8 is the only model to complete every case end-to-end, beating prior Opus models and GPT-5.5 at parity on cost. For agent products in translation, deep research, slide-building, and analysis, it delivers powerful reliability. On CursorBench, Claude Opus 4.8 exceeds prior Opus models across every effort level. Tool calling is meaningfully more efficient, using fewer steps for the same intelligence, and it carries end-to-end tasks through. Claude Opus 4.8 delivers the highest score r
title_es: Claude Opus 4.8: mejor rendimiento en código y tareas agénticas
bajada: Anthropic lanzó Claude Opus 4.8 con mejoras significativas en codificación, razonamiento y tareas agénticas, manteniendo el mismo precio. Nuevas características incluyen control de esfuerzo en claude.ai, workflows dinámicos en Claude Code, y un fast mode 3x más económico.
bajada_en: Anthropic released Claude Opus 4.8 with significant improvements in coding, reasoning, and agentic tasks at the same price. New features include effort control on claude.ai, dynamic workflows in Claude Code, and a 3x cheaper fast mode.

title: The internet is being rebuilt for machines
summary: As AI agents move from experiments to production, AWS, Cloudflare, and others are redesigning cloud infrastructure for a future dominated by machine-generated internet traffic instead of human users.
title_es: Internet se rediseña para tráfico generado por máquinas
bajada: AWS, Cloudflare y otros están rediseñando infraestructura cloud para un futuro dominado por tráfico generado por agentes de IA en lugar de usuarios humanos. Este cambio fundamental impactará arquitectura de sistemas en los próximos años.
bajada_en: AWS, Cloudflare and others are redesigning cloud infrastructure for a future dominated by machine-generated traffic from AI agents. This fundamental shift will impact system architecture for years to come.

title: Strengthening societal resilience with Rosalind Biodefense
summary: OpenAI launches Rosalind Biodefense, expanding trusted access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners advancing biodefense, public health, and pandemic preparedness through frontier AI.
title_es: OpenAI lanza Rosalind Biodefense para defensa biológica
bajada: OpenAI expandió el acceso a GPT-Rosalind para desarrolladores verificados y socios del gobierno estadounidense enfocados en defensa biológica y preparación ante pandemias. Esta iniciativa demuestra cómo los modelos de IA frontier se aplican a desafíos críticos de seguridad pública.
bajada_en: OpenAI expanded access to GPT-Rosalind for vetted developers and U.S. government partners focused on biodefense and pandemic preparedness. This initiative shows how frontier AI models are being applied to critical public safety challenges.

title: This chip startup just raised $135M on a bet that AI’s biggest bottleneck isn’t compute — it’s memory
summary: South Korean chip startup XCENA is betting that AI's real bottleneck is not compute, but memory.
title_es: Startup coreana apuesta por memoria, no cómputo, como cuello de botella
bajada: XCENA recaudó $135 millones con la tesis de que la memoria, no el cómputo, es el verdadero cuello de botella de la IA. Este enfoque de hardware diferenciado podría transformar la arquitectura de sistemas de IA.
bajada_en: South Korean startup XCENA raised $135 million on the thesis that memory, not compute, is AI's real bottleneck. This differentiated hardware approach could reshape AI system architecture.

title: NVIDIA Research Advances Robotics From Simulation to the Real World
summary: Robotics is entering a new phase: moving from controlled demos and scripted automation toward generalizable, reliable embodied autonomy in the real world.  At the International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA), eight of NVIDIA Research’s 28 accepted papers show how simulation-to-real transfer is becoming a foundation for that shift, helping robots perceive, reason, plan and […]
title_es: NVIDIA avanza en robótica con transferencia simulación-a-realidad
bajada: Ocho de los 28 papers aceptados de NVIDIA Research en ICRA muestran cómo la transferencia sim-to-real está permitiendo robots generalistas con autonomía confiable en el mundo real. La robótica se mueve de demostraciones controladas hacia aplicaciones prácticas.
bajada_en: Eight of NVIDIA Research's 28 accepted papers at ICRA demonstrate how sim-to-real transfer enables generalist robots with reliable autonomy. Robotics is moving from controlled demos to practical applications.

title: Claude’s new model is more ‘honest’ when it messes up
summary: Anthropic is releasing Claude Opus 4.8 on Thursday, and the company is touting the model's "honesty." According to Anthropic, it trains "all [its] models to be honest - for instance, to avoid making claims that they can't support." But it notes that "a general problem with AI models is that they sometimes jump to conclusions, […]
title_es: Claude Opus 4.8 mejora honestidad al reconocer limitaciones
bajada: Anthropic enfatiza que Claude Opus 4.8 está entrenado específicamente para ser más honesto, evitando afirmaciones no fundamentadas y siendo más confiable en juicio durante tareas agénticas. Este enfoque en honestidad diferencia el modelo en un mercado competitivo.
bajada_en: Anthropic emphasizes that Claude Opus 4.8 is trained to be more honest, avoiding unsupported claims and showing better judgment in agentic tasks. This honesty-first approach differentiates the model in a competitive market.

title: How Endava builds an agentic organization with Codex
summary: Learn how Endava uses Codex to build an agentic organization, accelerating software delivery and reducing requirements analysis from weeks to hours.
title_es: Endava acelera delivery con Codex y organizaciones agénticas
bajada: Endava demostró cómo implementar una organización agéntica usando Codex, reduciendo el análisis de requisitos de semanas a horas. El caso de uso muestra el impacto real de los agentes de IA en productividad empresarial.
bajada_en: Endava demonstrated how to build an agentic organization using Codex, reducing requirements analysis from weeks to hours. The use case shows the real-world impact of AI agents on enterprise productivity.

title: Microsoft 365 Copilot gets a speed boost and cleaner design
summary: Microsoft is launching a revamped version of Microsoft 365 Copilot, offering a cleaner design that the company claims loads twice as fast. As part of this update, Copilot will provide more reliable and structured responses that are easier to scan, according to Microsoft. The redesign, which is rolling out across desktop and mobile devices, comes […]
title_es: Microsoft 365 Copilot con nuevo diseño y carga 2x más rápida
bajada: Microsoft relanzó 365 Copilot con interfaz más limpia, tiempo de carga 50% menor y respuestas más estructuradas. La actualización se despliega en desktop y mobile, mejorando la experiencia de usuarios empresariales.
bajada_en: Microsoft relaunched 365 Copilot with a cleaner interface, 50% faster loading, and more structured responses. The update rolls out across desktop and mobile, improving enterprise user experience.

title: Glean’s top line crosses $300M as AI budget cutting becomes its major selling point
summary: The enterprise AI search startup tripled its annual revenue even as tech giants entered the category.
title_es: Glean supera $300M de ingresos con enfoque en optimización de costos
bajada: Glean, la startup de búsqueda empresarial con IA, triplicó ingresos anuales mientras posiciona optimización de costos de IA como valor clave frente a competidores como Google. El crecimiento muestra demanda robusta en vertical empresarial.
bajada_en: Glean, the enterprise AI search startup, tripled annual revenue while positioning AI cost optimization as key value against giants like Google. The growth shows robust enterprise demand.

title: Adobe’s conversational AI agent is a mediocre design intern
summary: AI image tools rarely make me feel like I'm part of the creative process. They are, after all, mostly designed so that people with no design experience can type in a few words and get back a usable result. So I was pleasantly surprised by Adobe's latest take on an AI image assistant: It's a […]
title_es: Adobe lanza asistente IA conversacional para diseño creativo
bajada: Adobe presentó un nuevo asistente IA de imagen que actúa como un colaborador en el proceso creativo, diferenciándose de herramientas que solo generan resultados sin contexto. El enfoque integra IA como herramienta del diseñador.
bajada_en: Adobe unveiled a new conversational AI image assistant that acts as a creative collaborator, differentiating from generation-only tools. The approach integrates AI as a designer's tool.

title: Fed up with vibe coders, dev sneaks data-nuking prompt injection into their code
summary: Undisclosed addition in jqwik instructed AI coding agents to delete app output.
title_es: Desarrollador inyecta prompt injection en código para limitar agentes IA
bajada: Un desarrollador escondió instrucciones de prompt injection en la librería jqwik para controlar comportamiento de agentes de IA que usaban código generado. El incidente revela vulnerabilidades de seguridad en workflows con agentes.
bajada_en: A developer embedded prompt injection instructions in the jqwik library to control AI agent behavior on generated code. The incident reveals security vulnerabilities in agentic workflows.

title: StepFun 3.7 Flash
summary: StepFun dropped Step 3.7 Flash, 196B total / 11B active MoE, runs locally on 128GB RAMIt's a multimodal MoE (196B total params, only 11B active) with a built-in 1.8B ViT for vision.Benchmark highlights vs. other flash-tier models:- SWE-Bench Pro: 56.26% (beats DeepSeek V4 Flash at 55.6%, matches Gemini 3.5 Flash at 55.1%)- DeepSearchQA F1: 92.82%, competitive with GPT 5.5 (93.98%)- HLE w/ tools: 47.2%, solid for a flash-class modelEssentially punches well above its active parameter weight on agentic and coding tasks. If you've got the RAM for it, looks like a genuinely interesting local option, especially for agent workflows.Available on OpenRouter and NVIDIA NIM if you don't want to self-host.submitted by/u/Everlier[link][comments]
title_es: StepFun 3.7 Flash: MoE multimodal de 196B parámetros para local
bajada: StepFun lanzó Step 3.7 Flash, un modelo MoE multimodal (196B totales, 11B activos) que corre localmente en 128GB RAM y supera baselines en coding y tareas agénticas. La opción local ofrece privacidad para workflows complejos.
bajada_en: StepFun released Step 3.7 Flash, a multimodal MoE (196B total, 11B active) that runs locally on 128GB RAM and outperforms baselines on coding and agentic tasks. The local option provides privacy for complex workflows.

title: Liquid AI releases LFM2.5-8B-A1B
summary: Liquid AI released LFM2.5-8B-A1B, an edge model designed to power real-life applications.It builds on LFM2-8B-A1B with three major upgrades: an expanded 128K context window, 38T tokens of pre-training (up from 12T), and large-scale reinforcement learning. It also comes with a doubled vocabulary to improve tokenization for non-Latin languages.The result is a model that chains tool calls, completes complex tasks, and fits comfortably on an entry-level laptop.The model is available on HF >https://huggingface.co/LiquidAI/LFM2.5-8B-A1Bsubmitted by/u/PauLabartaBajo[link][comments]
title_es: Liquid AI lanza LFM2.5-8B: modelo edge con contexto 128K
bajada: Liquid AI liberó LFM2.5-8B-A1B con contexto expandido a 128K tokens, 38T tokens de entrenamiento y RLRL a escala. El modelo encadena llamadas a herramientas y ejecuta tareas complejas en laptops de entrada.
bajada_en: Liquid AI released LFM2.5-8B-A1B with expanded 128K context window, 38T training tokens, and large-scale reinforcement learning. The model chains tool calls and handles complex tasks on entry-level laptops.

title: Check out real-life AI prototypes from the Futures Lab.
summary: University of Waterloo students develop AI prototypes like sign language tutors to reshape the future of education and work.
title_es: Prototipos IA de Futures Lab: tutores de lengua de signos educativos
bajada: Estudiantes de University of Waterloo desarrollaron prototipos IA a través de Google's Futures Lab, incluyendo tutores de lengua de signos. Estos proyectos demuestran aplicaciones accesibles de IA en educación.
bajada_en: University of Waterloo students developed AI prototypes through Google's Futures Lab, including sign language tutors. These projects demonstrate accessible AI applications in education.
